name: Integration - Analyze Endpoint End-to-End Workflow
description: Tests the full workflow of the /analyze endpoint, including chunk retrieval, LLM response generation, and formatting.
input: POST request to /analyze endpoint with all dependencies available and configured
output: AnalyzeResponse with success=True, result containing structured comparative analysis, error=None, tips=None
error_scenarios: Azure Search or OpenAI API misconfigured
